acceptanceNotes.description: Produced brainstorm Work Brief validates through the artifacts package
Plan intake consumes the produced Work Brief only after it is persisted

background:
Input skills should preserve user intent as durable structured data.

Brainstorm context: A domain-neutral harness needs an exploratory intake path that still produces a typed artifact.
candidateE2ECases: brainstorm to plan-intake Work Brief handoff
A planner consumes the produced Work Brief without reading raw chat
desiredOutcome: The brainstorm producer writes a validator-accepted Work Brief through the common writer.

candidateScenarios: A planner consumes the produced Work Brief without reading raw chat
producerSignals.ideaContext: A domain-neutral harness needs an exploratory intake path that still produces a typed artifact.
options: Persist one canonical Work Brief JSON carrier
Keep exploratory alternatives as candidate signals
tradeoffs: Exploration notes must not become final planner-owned risk classification

nonGoals: Do not produce an Implementation Plan

ownership.concurrencyNotes: I-05B producer-owned Work Brief output; final planning/risk analysis is downstream.

problemOrOpportunity: Exploratory work can otherwise remain trapped in chat history.
risksAndUnknowns: Candidate signals may need refinement by plan
Exploration notes must not become final planner-owned risk classification
title: Explore typed intake artifact flow
userVisibleBehavior: Users can start with an unclear idea and still get a plan-ready Work Brief
